                301.Narrator: *A blast of mental energy washes over you, filling the room. Your tadpole squirms, urging you to obey.*note: Mindmeld

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dc6ad14e-1302-5d18-8ee1-b18bba33d1baSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: he0577770gf20fg46f0g8d34ga6a1f7298c73Text UUID: f6e2d7d7-96ad-482f-8007-024ad09b4dcfGroup ID: 208de4e0-f5d7-b990-b89f-2d1dfee1b10bGroup Index: 1
                • +

                                26.Narrator: *You slip into Minthara's mind while all her attention is focused on saving her own skin. You can feel her guilt everywhere, writhing and churning. All it takes is one little push...*

                                  23.Minthara: Mine! It's - it's my fault. I failed you, my lord. Please, forgive me.note: Addressing Ketheric

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0f193bd7-d16f-9ed4-b2a0-225365d10a17Speaker: 2 (Minthara)Text Handle: h9e0a9bf6g5555g41bfgbf11g55e288690a6fText UUID: ea6cce89-a446-4395-98b1-f2b4519df251Group ID: 0ff195cd-3b03-9b41-0671-6a1bd28b06b3Group Index: 1
                                  • +
                                    49.Speaker 0: Guilty, then. My lord?note: Z'Rell is surprised - she wasn't expecting an easy confession. She turns to Ketheric, who's considering Minthara's words.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1fa12bd3-fe11-8acc-e5f4-2695d53e17c0Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: hf7f03ef9ga3f3g4dd9gb191g3c98898ff0e0Text UUID: e0fa3217-b801-4e11-820a-9c534968dc42Group ID: 0ff195cd-3b03-9b41-0671-6a1bd28b06b3Group Index: 2
                                    • +
                                      68.Ketheric: I gave you this command because I saw something in you. Your efficiency - ruthlessness - your killer's instinct. I treasured them all.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2b535e7b-ca44-c196-c186-6ae4e553daf4Speaker: 1 (Ketheric)Text Handle: h515de5fag5c7fg4a4fgb60dgcfbf5cc7fe5bText UUID: f276d63e-9419-4b54-a608-1b417e52a121Group ID: 0ff195cd-3b03-9b41-0671-6a1bd28b06b3Group Index: 3
                                      • +
                                        264.Ketheric: But honesty? Remorse? These are no use to me.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c16243f2-aacb-a372-7936-66bcc21e90b2Speaker: 1 (Ketheric)Text Handle: h94b9f76fgdba6g4dd0g91c1gb923810a327cText UUID: 96c643fd-eb60-4ee4-899c-bd8a7cf72fa1Group ID: 0ff195cd-3b03-9b41-0671-6a1bd28b06b3Group Index: 4
                                        • +

                                                                                227.Speaker 6: You creaking old bag of shit!note: Drenn grabs a halberd from a surprised guard and hurls it at KETHERIC. It hits him full-force in the chest and he stumbles backwards, falling into his chair.

                                                                                  160.Ketheric: Hmm.note: After his initial shock reaction, Ketheric grabs the halberd with one hand and pulls it free. The wound left by the blade is just a glowing purple gash, which disappears before our eyes, leaving his chest without even a scratch.MOO_Execution_Event_KethericRegeneratedGLO_Ketheric_Knows_AboutImmortality

                                                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                                                  settype Global
                                                                                  • MOO_Execution_Event_KethericRegenerated {d71b5d18-1a38-2bbd-50ce-6e06fa5f6704} = True
                                                                                  • GLO_Ketheric_Knows_AboutImmortality {6d37f35d-fcaf-4b80-97f6-e44473ef5fbb} = True

                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6de3573c-f3e0-db88-4f7b-584eb4a77a44Speaker: 1 (Ketheric)Text Handle: hc14dd845gcc27g4eacg8bf9gfb6a4d2c5924Text UUID: d63f0ffe-4f67-4b96-9394-1538a5dd2aceGroup ID: a439ecd4-7766-db4b-bdb0-13c81222fad6Group Index: 1
                                                                                  • +
                                                                                    116.Speaker 0: I'm so sorry, my lord. She's an unbeliever - outside my control.note: Ketheric walks over to the terrified goblin

                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4bc64594-413b-8b39-a7de-db235860150bSpeaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h1dd4ed5eg5b4ag486cg812bgcb0e9cdec745Text UUID: 47c53672-9d86-4ff9-89d7-4d72f3c2e823Group ID: a439ecd4-7766-db4b-bdb0-13c81222fad6Group Index: 2
                                                                                    • +
                                                                                      328.Ketheric: Try again.note: Ketheric drops the halberd at the goblin's feet.

                                                                                      Metadata

                                                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e9f9c28f-061f-9082-7dfe-970d1bcb32f8Speaker: 1 (Ketheric)Text Handle: h346655e6g34eeg4a32g8cc8g7609702b5340Text UUID: 4979e53c-6690-48bb-9f64-821597abc9cbGroup ID: a439ecd4-7766-db4b-bdb0-13c81222fad6Group Index: 3
                                                                                      • +
                                                                                        271.Ketheric: Huh.note: The terrified goblin picks up the halberd and swings to decapitate Ketheric, but it crashes into his neck, cracking bone. He doesn't flinch. Ketheric pulls out the halberd, which also leaves a glowing purple wound, and tosses it aside.

                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c9d3bf57-045e-f698-26d3-58b92fe4afd8Speaker: 1 (Ketheric)Text Handle: h4c953322g7270g4695ga2e7g7ec1f5286280Text UUID: a28df92b-8fea-478c-b621-1be5213d4c09Group ID: a439ecd4-7766-db4b-bdb0-13c81222fad6Group Index: 4
                                                                                        • +
                                                                                          273.Speaker 6: No - NO!note: Ketheric brings two heavy, mailed fists down on the goblin, killing Drenn where she stands.MOO_Execution_Event_KethericKillsGoblin

                                                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                                                          settype Global
                                                                                          • MOO_Execution_Event_KethericKillsGoblin {9dece1d1-4fad-6ea3-9438-09d63a564af0} = True

                                                                                          • +
                                                                                            283.Ketheric: Dispose of the rest as you see fit.

                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d10d0e48-2785-3350-1adb-1457c5a2ab72Speaker: 1 (Ketheric)Text Handle: h103e3e0dgbda6g407dga8e6g7735574e5712Text UUID: cf7fb960-0cf1-4c25-91f7-48e63f129d14Group ID: a439ecd4-7766-db4b-bdb0-13c81222fad6Group Index: 6

                                                                                                                                        156.Narrator: *In another lifetime, you were greeted in this throne room like a God, not the living wreck you are now.*Dark Urge

                                                                                                                                        checktype Tag | speaker 5 Player

                                                                                                                                          119.Narrator: *Your disgrace has something to do with this Ketheric. You yearn to flay him until he forgets himself, as you have.*

                                                                                                                                          Metadata

                                                                                                                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4e90dfa0-43d1-fd5a-73f5-61bfbca4e036Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h26af1b34gcacbg4265ga5bfg1289db0b6638Text UUID: f458d137-a97e-4d21-9077-6d32c41de7f4Group ID: 690cf605-f8be-9f82-ae3f-6c6aa9c32f9cGroup Index: 1
                                                                                                                                          • +
                                                                                                                                            332.Player: Grit your teeth and ignore the feeling. Making a scene won't answer your questions.

                                                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: edad66db-0d58-e274-e6e4-9d08a4103dccSpeaker: 5 (Player)Text Handle: h79d36ec1gc769g49b9g96cbgae629fbc1f8fText UUID: 9fd458f5-a0ad-416f-86a7-6d2e498a3879Show Once: True
                                                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                                                              213.Narrator: *With difficulty, you banish the pooling evil that bewitches your quivering limbs.*

                                                                                                                                              Metadata

                                                                                                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9bdc4b86-41d3-57b5-cdb3-c893b5ebf29eSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h5ab561c7g435ag4079ga4f2ge1eb34010b9bText UUID: 088764f3-1f5c-45bd-80b2-e95738c42af8Timeline Phase Index: 134Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9bdc4b86-41d3-57b5-cdb3-c893b5ebf29eTimeline Phase Duration: 13.87sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Animation 1 Resource ID: 77247978-12aa-460d-98bd-554a51bad3b3Timeline Animation 1 Resource File: Public/Shared/Assets/Characters/_Anims/Dwarves/_Female/DWR_F_Rig/_Construction/DWR_F_Rig_DFLT_CINE_Disapprove_React_02.GR2Group ID: 9bdc4b86-41d3-57b5-cdb3-c893b5ebf29eGroup Index: 0
                                                                                                                                              • •
                                                                                                                                                229.Narrator: *Perhaps parts of you were scattered in this spire. Time to knit yourself together.* [End]

                                                                                                                                                Metadata

                                                                                                                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a608b739-de3b-dbfe-55f3-a6848e98b6c8Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h456a77a6g6cdbg4693g8705gf0bfeb2b37f7Text UUID: 9c61a408-7627-46f5-b5f0-3dfa62d71987End Node: TrueGroup ID: 9bdc4b86-41d3-57b5-cdb3-c893b5ebf29eGroup Index: 1
                                                                                                                                          • +
                                                                                                                                            126.Player: Indulge in your thoughts of lacerating him.

                                                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 56132cce-25b9-af79-8b27-ac0db728c77cSpeaker: 5 (Player)Text Handle: h614440e9gd286g46ffgbef5ge37210546c33Text UUID: 413b1655-082e-4f41-b4c7-6709c3e3ad66Show Once: True
                                                                                                                                            • •
                                                                                                                                              342.Narrator: *He healed up a treat - he could enjoy your cuts forever and a day.* [End]

                                                                                                                                              Metadata

                                                                                                                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f2bee7fb-9503-60f0-6300-2ea1548291e1Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h3d797f52g746dg4a0ag8451gbf31aaf78c64Text UUID: e20b2af1-c5bc-4c1e-bc15-0826b59a27e2Timeline Phase Index: 137Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f2bee7fb-9503-60f0-6300-2ea1548291e1Timeline Phase Duration: 5.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Animation 1 Resource ID: 77247978-12aa-460d-98bd-554a51bad3b3Timeline Animation 1 Resource File: Public/Shared/Assets/Characters/_Anims/Dwarves/_Female/DWR_F_Rig/_Construction/DWR_F_Rig_DFLT_CINE_Disapprove_React_02.GR2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1158.88s-1164.22s] | @ 1161.36s | speaker 5 | Angry (8) | variation 4Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1158.88s-1164.22s] | @ 1161.52s | peanut slot 0 | Angry (8) | variation 4 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1158.88s-1164.22s] | @ 1161.6s | peanut slot 1 | Angry (8) | variation 4 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1158.88s-1164.22s] | @ 1162.31s | peanut slot 2 | Angry (8) | variation 4 | mimicryEnd Node: True
                                                                                                                                          • +
                                                                                                                                            294.Player: Whoever he is, he stands in your way.

                                                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d7e77568-8c50-ee95-831c-d46234aabef3Speaker: 5 (Player)Text Handle: hf5ba57fdg297ag4a3cgbd08g6fdff0c4c2a2Text UUID: add32bef-e687-414b-9929-de65a53d55b8Show Once: True
                                                                                                                                            • •
                                                                                                                                              157.Narrator: *Nothing sickens you more than a man who is unkillable. But to a veteran deviant such as yourself, it is but a matter of time.* [End]

                                                                                                                                              Metadata

                                                          218.Ketheric: Ah, the True Soul who saved poor, lost Nere from his mistakes.!UND_TheDrowNere_State_LeftAbsoluteUND_TheDrowNere_State_WentMT

                                  45.Speaker 0: I'm being unkind. Anyone might have struggled with such imperfect tools - goblins are prone to failure.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1e0a61e6-7ead-5b76-cf3d-df8ce9853694Speaker: 0 (Speaker 0)Text Handle: h6623b5beg53f3g4c8ag9c7eg0696754d3bf2Text UUID: df804661-d151-44df-92a5-61bb600b1177Group ID: 18581889-364c-a3c2-ac47-e20337104bccGroup Index: 1
                                  • +
                                    224.Minthara: I - yes! It's the goblins' fault. They failed you, General, not me.note: Addressing Ketheric

                                                          69.Player: I saw the horrors they committed in the Absolute's name.

                                                          Metadata

                                  324.Narrator: *In Ketheric's place, you feel an absence. No psionic power. No tadpole at all.*GLO_Ketheric_Knows_KethericNotTadpoled

                                  Flags and Tags

                                  settype Global

            75.Narrator: *A blast of mental energy washes over you, filling the room. Your tadpole squirms, urging you to obey.*note: Mindmeld

                      297.Ketheric: I would remind you that while in my halls, you obey me - just as you would any other Chosen.

                      Metadata
